% A genuinely English deck: the foreign-prose-leakage gate must NOT fire here.
\documentclass[aspectratio=169]{beamer}
\begin{document}

\begin{frame}{Existence of Optimal Couplings}
  Let $\mu,\nu$ be probability measures on Polish spaces and let the cost $c$ be
  lower semicontinuous. We show that a minimizing coupling $\pi^\star$ exists.
  The proof extracts a convergent subsequence by compactness and passes to the
  limit using lower semicontinuity.
\end{frame}

\end{document}
